_comment: GEO site config for /geo-blog and /new-geo-project. The project repo root = the directory that contains this geo-content/ folder. All paths below are relative to that repo root.

caseStudies: Kubin Automotive — full site built in ~2 weeks
brand.pricing: Project-based, no fixed public tiers. Give honest ranges and 'depends on scope'. NEVER invent exact prices.
